feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Public Cloud – Standard CDS for SII eDocument status/submission (Spain)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m working in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud with Spanish SII eDocuments. Is there a standard CDS view that provides whether an eDocument was submitted to AEAT and its current status (e.g., CREA, REGIS, RERR, REJE)?

I’m aware the statuses can be monitored in Manage Electronic Documents / eDocument Cockpit apps, but I’m looking specifically for a CDS in Public Cloud that exposes this information for reporting/integration.

Thanks!

entry.title: It is not possible to configure the “Reason for Refusal to Pay a Bill of Exchange”
entry.content:
Is there currently no option to configure the “Reasons for Refusal to Pay a Bill of Exchange” in the public cloud? When will this feature be implemented?

 

Best regards

entry.title: RAP Fiori Application Works in ADT Preview but Not Correctly in Fiori Launchpad (SAP Public cloud)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have developed an RAP Excel Upload application using RAP in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud using ABAP Development Tools (ADT Eclipse) only, without using SAP Business Application Studio.

WHAT IS WORKING

In ADT Eclipse, when I click Preview on the Service Binding, the application works perfectly.

All features are working correctly:

  • Create upload record
  • Upload Excel file
  • Download template
  • Process Excel
  • Header data is visible
  • Item data is visible
  • Navigation between Header and Item levels works correctly

    WHAT I DID

    1. Created the Fiori application using Quick Fiori Application Generator in ADT.
    2. Transported the objects to the Test system.
    3. Created:
      • IAM App
      • Business Catalog
    4. Assigned the catalog to the required business role.

    Now the application appears in the Fiori Launchpad.


    ISSUE

    Although the application opens in the Fiori Launchpad, it does not behave the same way as in ADT Preview.

    In ADT Preview, I can see the navigation arrow (>) to expand and navigate between Header and Item tables.

    However, in the Fiori Launchpad version, the navigation arrow is not visible, so I cannot navigate from Header to Item records.

    Because of this, the application is not functioning as expected.

    Screenshot

    Below is the screen where the Fiori app was generated in ADT.

    This screen shot is from the ADT preview here it is working correctly



    This one is from the Fiori Launchpad which is not working correctly

     

     



    Question

    Could someone please help me understand:

    • Why the navigation arrow is visible in ADT Preview but not in Fiori Launchpad?
    • Is there any additional configuration required for RAP associations or Fiori elements navigation in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

    Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

    Thank you!

entry.title: quantity-dependent component scaling - BOM
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition, is there any plan to support quantity-dependent component scaling directly within a single BOM item (for example, 2 components up to 400 pieces, 4 components from 800 pieces, etc.)?

Currently, it seems that the only way to model such scaling is to create multiple alternative BOMs and link them through separate production versions with defined lot-size ranges.

Will future releases allow quantity scaling at the BOM-item level, or will the approach via separate production versions remain the standard way to handle this requirement?

 

Kind regards,

Jana

entry.title: Lock Message During Role Type Creation for customer projects under Professional Services in CBC
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are currently performing Role Type creation for customer projects under Professional Services. During the save step, the system displays a dialog with the options “Continue with the lock” or “Cancel lock.”

Please note that this configuration is being carried out in SAP Central Business Configuration (CBC). Upon checking the system message, it indicates the following behavior:

  • Selecting “Continue with the lock” will confirm the existing locks and allow the configuration to be saved.
  • Selecting “Cancel lock” will close the dialog, and the configuration changes will not be saved.

In this scenario and whether it is safe to continue with the lock while saving the configuration as the lock will not be removed until the Transport imported into the Test environment. We need to edit the configuration further as the discussion with the business still in progress on this regard.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Intercompany customer invoices without reference to SD billing
entry.content:
How to post Intercompany customer invoices without reference to SD billing?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CBC behavior when an activated scope item is deprecated or removed
entry.content:
In SAP Central Business Configuration (CBC), I have a question about SAP upgrades where the scope item itself becomes deprecated or planned for removal, not cases where apps or features used within a scope item are deprecated.

If a scope item that is already activated in CBC becomes deprecated or scheduled for removal, and a successor scope item is introduced:

  • Will the successor scope item be automatically activated during the upgrade?
  • Will it be automatically applied or transported to the customer systems (e.g. test / production)?
  • What happens to the original scope item that is deprecated or removed?
    • Is it automatically deactivated or deleted during the upgrade?

Or does this scenario require manual scope adjustment and migration activities by the customer or implementation team?

entry.title: JOURNAL ENTRY - FINANCIAL TRANSACTION TYPE FIELD NOT AVAILABLE FOR DERIVATION
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

in order to fulfill the business requirement on differentiating the single position on document entry, we are working on field "Transaction Type" to meet the business needs.

Analyzing the field "Transaction Type" seems not available the standard option to derive the content of the field itself as offered by others SAP releases (i.e. on premise).

Could you please advice about the "Transaction Type" (RMVCT) field? We are expecting the derivation "TPM_DERIVE_ACCNT" being in S/4HANA Public Edition.

Looking forward to yoru kind feedback.

Thanks and Regards,
Massimo


--- Steps to Reproduce ---

The explanation should be enoug to understand/replicate the case in SAP own system.



*Note To SAP:
I give approval for SAP Support to use the Steps to Reproduce I have provided in this workflow, while connected to my impacted non-production environments, even if the steps result in a change being made and my approval remains valid until the issue is resolved, unless I inform SAP Support otherwise.

--- Issue Date (UTC) ---
DIGITS-03-04 23:00:00 - DIGITS-03-17 21:01:55


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to Prepare an Indirect Method Cash Flow Statement in Compliance with Chinese Accounting Standard
entry.content:
I need to prepare a cash flow statement under Chinese Accounting Standards (CAS). There is an issue with the system’s custom analytical queries, so I found the app Cash Flow Statement - Indirect Method. I created a new financial statement version (FSV) to be used for the indirect cash flow statement. However, after selecting this financial statement version and executing the report in the Cash Flow Statement - Indirect Method app, the values in the measure columns are not related to the items in my financial statement version. The measures generated by this app do not match the content of the indirect method under Chinese Accounting Standards.
 
In addition, I have not assigned semantic tags to the financial statement version, because the semantic tags for this app shown in SAP Learning also do not comply with the requirements of Chinese Accounting Standards.
 
(Reference: https://learning.sap.com/courses/financial-statement-reporting-zh/creating-the-cash-flow-statement-indirect-method_bf92692d-7d4d-47d4-93a0-47641afc4485)

entry.title: Tax Posting Issue with Sales Tax Payable G/L Account in Concur Integration
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We are facing an issue while posting an invoice from SAP Concur using the G/L account 22002000 (Sales Tax Payable – CO). 

To investigate the problem, we tried reproducing the issue manually in the foreground using the Create Supplier Invoice app. During this process, we encountered the following two issues:

  1. When the tax G/L line item (account 22002000) was entered, the system displayed the error:
    “Please enter a value for field Base Amount for account 22002000.”

  2. To resolve this, we entered a base amount for the tax G/L item. However, after doing so, the system raised another error:
    “Tax entry not possible in this item.”

Could you please review this issue and advise on how it can be resolved? For reference, I have attached screenshots of both error messages.

Note: The G/L account 22002000 is configured with “Posting without tax allowed” = Yes.

Looking forward to your guidance.

Thanks

Naveen Kumar

entry.title: Tax Classification Not Maintained per Sales Area in Customer Master (F0850A)
entry.content:
Tax classification automatically transferred to all sales areas


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sales Order Print Output Log S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
We have requirement to export PDF string for sales order confirmation. As standard sales order API doesn't provide PDF xstring we are thing of using API API_CLOUD_PRINT_PULL_SRV to pull directly from print queues but challenge here is we are unable to fetch relation between technical ID displayed here in message log and sales order number.

Does anyone know other API which can provide this data to establish link between printer API and sales order number.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud PR Workflow
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have created a PR workflow configuration that excludes the PR requestor from the approval process. However, an error occurs if the PRrequestor is also one of the required approvers. In this case, how can I reassign the PR to another user for approval when the PR encounters an error?

entry.title: CA_OC_OUTPUT_REQUEST_SRV S4 Public Cloud
entry.content: I want to consume CA_OC_OUTPUT_REQUEST_SRV in S4 Public Cloud but I am getting authorisation error while fetching items. How do I provide required authorisation or does any know communication arrangement for this service .

entry.title: Required Automation Of Delivery & PGI Creation and Billing Documents In AIL Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Team,

  1. QR Code scanning
    The sales person scans the QR codes of all trolleys and enters the Sales Order Number and Vehicle Number in the system during the scanning process.
  2. Submission
    After completing the scanning of all trolleys, the sales person clicks the “Submit” button.
  3. Reference Number Generation
    Once the Submit button is clicked, the system generates a Reference Number.
    Under this reference number, the following documents are automatically generated:
  • Invoice
  • E-Invoice
  • E-Way Bill
  • Digital Signature
  1. Bill Download
    The sales person opens the application on the computer and enters the Reference Number and Vehicle Number.
    The Download button will appear. After clicking it, all bills related to that vehicle will be downloaded.
  2. Trip Sheet Generation
    After entering the Reference Number in the Trip Sheet, all invoices related to that reference will appear in the table.
    Finally, click the Save button to generate the Trip Sheet.
  3. Is the Automatic Delivery and PGI creation in SAP Public Cloud?

Regards,

Ashish

9049672320

entry.title: Group Journal Entries report with complete user name
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

We're using Group Reporting Public Cloud version. I'm exploring standard applications to get a list of Group Journal entries including user name. So far all the applications I've explored only bring CB user but not complete user name. Is there any existing application that brings that information?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Restricting Quality Inspection Lot number range buffering in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
After doing some search on restricting number range buffering as we use to do in on-premises and private cloud through SNRO, still not able to find any alternative app specific to public cloud for stopping buffering for

QM area:
- QLOSE (inspection lots in QM)
- QMEL_NR (notification number range)

Any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: Implementing Custom Logic to Include Project Information in Billing Email Template
entry.content:
Team,

We are currently working on a business scenario similar to the one described in the following SAP documentation:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_EXTENSIBILITY_EXPLORER/397bf26514884cc8a5ece65970e8e3e6/3f898d6f59254ef497f00c78423cec7a.html?locale=en-US&version=LATEST

Our business requirement is to include Event ID / Event Description (Project ID / Project Description) in the invoice email template that is sent to our customers.

We have followed the implementation steps described in the SAP documentation. However, we are currently facing difficulties at Step 4 of the implementation.

According to the documentation, we need to create a new custom logic (for example, Project Info in Billing Email Template) in the Sales: Sales Document business context using BAdI Sales Header Modification.

However, the current version of the Custom Fields and Logic app requires us to select both:

  • Business Context

  • Business Object Node

    In order to determine the extension points where the logic should be implemented.

    We were able to select Business Context: "Sales: Sales Document", but we are unsure which extension point should be selected to implement the logic for the custom field "Customer Project ID".

    When selecting this business context, the system displays 23 different extension points, and it is unclear which one should be used for this scenario.

    Could you please advise which specific extension point should be selected so that we can implement the custom logic to populate the Customer Project ID field for use in the billing email template?

    For your reference, we have attached a screenshot showing the available extension points after selecting the Sales: Sales Document business context.

    Please note that this field is very important for our business, as the Project ID / Project Description must be visible in the invoice email template sent to customers. Therefore, any guidance on the correct extension point and implementation approach would be greatly appreciated.

    We kindly request your support in resolving this issue at the earliest convenience.

entry.title: Billing Condition Type to GL Account CDS view for creating custom sales register in sap public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to create a custom report for Sales register. Which contains the billing document item details along with the condition type and the GL used to post the condition amount.

I am planning to develop this in the Eclipse.

I have tried to achieve the field by joining multiple CDS view as below. But unable to get the expected result.

I_BillingDocumentItem
I_BillingDocumentItemPrcgElmnt
I_SalesDocument
I_OperationalAcctgDocItem

If anyone from the community please help me to achieve this requirement.

entry.title: Migration Cockpit historical balance --> Where should the data be extracted from?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My customer wants historical balance. 🙂

I’m currently wondering where to get the data to insert into the migration template. In SAP ERP (legacy system), the GLT0 table makes the most sense, as it contains exactly the data we need (G/L account, fiscal year, period, balance). However, the data is spread across columns, so that one financial year per account is represented in just a single row. In the migration template, however, the balances need to be inserted one below the other.

Does anyone have any ideas or even experience with this migration object?

How can the data be extracted or converted within a reasonable timeframe?

What do I need to bear in mind to avoid making serious mistakes?

With the documentation currently available, I’m not really sure where to start 😞

Thanks in advance for any hint!

Best regards,

Rado
